footer.description: Private Sri Lankan journeys shaped around heritage stays, wild coastlines, sacred cities, tea country, and slow luxury.
footer.conciergeText: Colombo based travel design for private guests, families, and boutique groups.
footer.availability: Open daily for bespoke travel requests

accommodations.title: Accommodations
accommodations.description: A curated collection of Sri Lankan hotels, villas, resorts, and private hideaways connected to real destination locations.
accommodations.emptyDescription: Luxury accommodations will appear here once they are added by the concierge team.

hero.description: Cinematic routes across tea hills, ancient capitals, wildlife sanctuaries, and salt kissed villas, shaped with editorial detail and white glove care.

edit.title: A refined foundation for extraordinary island travel.
edit.description: Every route is designed to feel personal from the first exchange: polished pacing, immersive place imagery, and a calm concierge rhythm for guests who want Sri Lanka handled with taste.

features.ancientCopy: Private access routes through Sigiriya, Kandy, Dambulla, and sacred cultural corridors.
features.teaCopy: Slow rail journeys, heritage bungalows, misty gardens, and curated Ceylon tastings.
features.coastCopy: Palm lined beaches, ocean villas, national parks, and golden hour coastal dining.

wild.caption: Safari mornings, temple evenings, and villas between both.
wild.title: Slow travel, sharp detail, and seamless private planning.
wild.description: From the first hello to the final airport transfer, each journey can move through heritage hotels, hill country gardens, coastal retreats, and wild landscapes without losing its sense of ease.

blogs.title: Blogs
blogs.description: Editorial stories, seasonal features, destination guides, and reflections from Sri Lanka's most evocative places will appear here.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Guest enquiries, consultation requests, and private travel planning details will be gathered here with calm concierge clarity.

adminLogin.title: Admin Login
adminLogin.description: Secure access for travel designers, concierge teams, and operations staff will begin from this private entry point.
